◎简　　介  

　　I want to be with you even if it's for one night.
　　I can do that.
　　I think that's how I'll live.
　　Don't you remember who I am???
　　Min-ah finds herself on a stranger's bed when she wakes up.
　　She's handcuffed.
　　Stranger Nam-gyu was next to her.
　　I want to let you go but my heart
　　wants you to stay...
　　I know it might be tough but stay here with me...
　　What's your name stranger?
　　Sorry
　　but I love you
introduction:
I want to be with you even if it's for one night.
I can do that.
I think that's how I'll live.
Don't you remember who I am???
Min-ah finds herself on a stranger's bed when she wakes up.
She's handcuffed.
Stranger Nam-gyu was next to her.
I want to let you go but my heart
wants you to stay...
I know it might be tough but stay here with me...
What's your name stranger?
Sorry
but I love you
